ddls:
CREATE TABLE "smart_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smart contract */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the smart contract */,
  "contract_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the smart contract */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the smart contract was created */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the smart contract */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract deployment (e.g., Deployed, Failed) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was deployed */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of the smart contract (e.g., Governance, Asset Management) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the smart contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smart_contracts_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contract owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Contact address of the owner (can be a wallet address) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or company of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract to which the function belongs */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the function (e.g., Public, External) */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for executing the function (e.g., onlyOwner, isEnable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the function */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the function (e.g., integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_functions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES smart_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract involved in the transaction */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner initiating the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Creation, Invocation) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Gas used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES smart_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken on the contract (e.g., Updated, Accessed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES smart_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract state */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract to which the state belongs */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., Enabled, Disabled) */,
  "state_value" TEXT /* Value of the state (e.g., true, false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_states_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES smart_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract parameter */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract to which the parameter belongs */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., gasPrice, gasLimit) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_parameters_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES smart_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control rule */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract to which the rule belongs */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., Read, Write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES smart_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event log */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract to which the event belongs */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Transfer, Approval) */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES smart_contracts ("contract_id")
)
